name: Permanent disability from machine crushing leg at factory, what benefits?
description: Disability pay, medical, wage replacement based on impairment.

mainEntity.name: Permanent disability from machine crushing leg at factory, what benefits?

acceptedAnswer.text: Disability pay, medical, wage replacement based on impairment.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Scheduled loss award plus ongoing medical, wage loss.** Utah scales by body part, e.g., leg high value[1]. Retraining too. Evaluate impairment rating. Lawyer fights lowballs.
